ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nfts" (
  "nft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NFT */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the NFT */,
  "filename" TEXT /* File name of the NFT asset */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity category of the NFT (e.g., common, uncommon) */,
  "on_sale_price" TEXT /* Current sale price of the NFT */,
  "on_sale_since" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating when the NFT was put on sale */,
  "supply_max" INTEGER /* Maximum supply of this type of NFT */,
  "supply_circulating" INTEGER /* Circulating supply of this NFT */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the creator of the NFT */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the NFT (e.g., art, collectibles, gaming items) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the NFT */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the NFT */,
  "is_auction" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the NFT is being auctioned */,
  "auction_start_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the auction starts */,
  "auction_end_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the auction ends */,
  "reserve_price" TEXT /* Minimum price at which the NFT can be sold in an auction */,
  "royalty_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of secondary sales that the creator should receive as royalties */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "nft_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the NFT being sold */,
  "sale_price" TEXT /* Price at which the NFT was sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale transaction */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the buyer of the NFT */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the seller of the NFT */,
  "is_auction" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the sale was through an auction */,
  "auction_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the auction, if applicable */,
  "royalty_paid" TEXT /* Amount paid as royalty to the creator */,
  "commission_paid" TEXT /* Amount paid as commission to the marketplace */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_nft_id FOREIGN KEY ("nft_id") REFERENCES nfts ("nft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the marketplace */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or description */,
  "wish_list" TEXT /* List of NFTs the user wishes to buy */,
  "favorite_items" TEXT /* List of NFTs the user has marked as favorites */,
  "is_creator" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is a creator */,
  "total_spent" TEXT /* Total amount spent by the user on the marketplace */,
  "total_earned" TEXT /* Total amount earned by the user on the marketplace */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nft_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute entry */,
  "nft_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the NFT related to these attributes */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills associated with the NFT (if applicable) */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins associated with the NFT (if applicable) */,
  "boosts" TEXT /* Boost value associated with the NFT */,
  "boosts2" INTEGER /* Secondary boost value associated with the NFT */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics for the NFT */,
  "rarity_score" TEXT /* Numerical score representing the rarity of the NFT */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the NFT has been used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nft_attributes_nft_id FOREIGN KEY ("nft_id") REFERENCES nfts ("nft_id")
)
